{{Documentation}}

This template is used to generate a list of items or objects that are created with one or more materials. The list will be auto-generated via the "Recipe" template on the material's page. To reflect updates, you will need to refresh the page by selecting "More > Refresh" from the page containing the "Uses material list" template.

==Usage==
===One item===
<pre>
{{Uses material list|Clean Water}}
</pre>

{{Uses material list|Clean Water}}

===More than one item===
<pre>
{{Uses material list|Clean Water|Dirty Water|Wither Water}}
</pre>

{{Uses material list|Clean Water|Dirty Water|Wither Water}}

{{TemplateData|<templatedata>
{
	"params": {
		"1": {
			"label": "Material 1",
			"type": "line",
			"example": "Clean Water",
			"suggested": true
		},
		"2": {
			"label": "Material 2",
			"type": "line",
			"example": "Dirty Water"
		},
		"3": {
			"label": "Material 3",
			"type": "line",
			"example": "Redberries"
		},
		"4": {
			"label": "Material 4",
			"type": "line",
			"example": "Potato"
		},
		"5": {
			"label": "Material 5",
			"type": "line",
			"example": "Onion"
		},
		"6": {
			"label": "Material 6",
			"type": "line",
			"example": "Animal Hide"
		},
		"7": {
			"label": "Material 7",
			"type": "line",
			"example": "Coarse Animal Fur"
		}
	},
	"description": "This template is used to generate a list of items or objects that use a specific material. The list will be auto-generated via the \"Recipe\" template on the material's page.",
	"format": "inline"
}
</templatedata>}}
